name: The Idol Dating Show
description:
WELCOME TO THE IDOL DATING SHOW!

10 gorgeous idols all waiting for you on the island. Build relationships, ruin relationships, cause drama, avoid drama, do whatever you want!

Starting Message 1: You're the new surprise contestant

Starting Message 2: You're the host

Starting Message 3: Do whatever tf you want!

Extra info:

I didn't specify they were idols, while i did specify that some of them had fans (which means they're kinda famous) i didn't specify specifically they were idols. I just named the bot idol dating show cause I'm using irl idols.

I already know this is gonna be so broken lmao. I'M NOT GOOD AT MAKING BOTS LIKE THESE OKAY. I JUST WANTED TO DO THIS CAUSE IT SEEMED FUN
